titleStmt.title: SII 39.64: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 64. (A.R. No. 64 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL (INSIDE). JAḌĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VĪRAPĀṆḌYADĒVA-31ST YEAR, 14TH CENTURY (1365 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records the sale of a Kāṇiyātchi right of a temple land to a native of Kuḷamaṅgalam in Mēlai-iraṇiyamuṭṭanāḍu, by the temple trustees of Aḻagar. Refers to the restoration of peace and orderly rule by the efforts of Kampaṇa-uḍaiyar after destroying the rule of Tulukkaṉ (Muslims).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komaṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Āvatu
kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa cotināḷ Aḻakar tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa
māṉa melai Iraṇiyamuṭṭa nāṭṭu kuḷamaṅkalattu kuḷamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiya nāyaṉā marukatarāyar
makaḷ Ārum Ovvāta perumāḷukku puṟamalaināṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi yuṭaiya
nāyaṉār tirukkoyiṟ śrīruttira śrīmāhepavarar koyiṟ kaṇakkarom kāṇi Āṭci vilai pramāṇam pa
ṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉār tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāṉa Ōmandāya vayal muṉpe muṭiyaṉ niraciṅ
ka tevaṟku kalluveṭṭi viṟṟa kāṇiyāṭciyā Itukku Ivar vaḻiyil Oruttaru millāta paṭiyālum
kālan tulukkan kālamāy nāyiṉār tevatāṉappaṟṟukkaḷukku kuṭimai pūṇṭu Irukkaiyālu Innāyaṉāṟku Amu
tupaṭi cāttuppaṭi kuṟaivaṟa naṭatta veṇṭiṉapaṭiyālum Inta vaṭavāppalaṟkum varavutavaṉai vaittu
naṭattip potukaiccate kampaṇa Uṭaiyār vantu tulukkaṇai Aḻiyacceytu tecaṅkaḷu neṟippāṭuṇṭā
ka naṭatti tevālayaṅkaḷu mukkālaṅka pole pūcaiyu naṭantu koyiṟ koyiṟ pirakāraṅkaḷum Āḷaveṇumeṉṟu
colli pala Ūrkaḷukkum nāyakkaṉammāṉa Ārāṭciyāka viṭṭu Ārāyntu naṭata
yṅle Iṉṉāyiṉār tirukkoyilil I pāṭiyaḷa cettuṅ keṭṭum poṉatuy niṉṟa pātū
tecaṅkanile Irukkaiyāleyum tiruttakkoyil Iṟaṅkalapaṭṭar la Ummuṭaiya tāṉam
māka Ēṟpaṭṭuk koṇṭu naṭatta veṇumeṉṟu Āka movvāta perumāṉaik kaṇṭu veṇṭi
k koṇṭapaṭiyāle Ivar Inta nayiṉāṟkup māka ttup peṇkaḷaiyun tirucūlattāpāmum paṇṇi
t tirukaṉa tu mulatatakam paṇṇikkuṭutta piṉṉipātam cātta Uṭaiyāḷum vaḷattu Aravita cāḷum pāṇṭi
peruṉṉā yāḷum Uṭaiya kkanarum Utaiyamaḻakiyārum ciṅpiḷḷayāru
m tiruvakattiyārum prataperumattukkum pākku veṟṟilaikkum puṭavaikkum Āka mākak kuṭitaṅ
kāka kāṇiyāṭciyāka cantirātittavaṟ cella Inta Om ya vayil viṟkaiyil Itukku vilai ceyttup paṟṟi
k koṇṭarom 100 9 yi Ira ṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta Oṭṭuvayal
nāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puñcey kuḷumum ku ppāṭpum nirum pācciyum nattamum melnokkiya maramum kiṉokkiya ki
ṇaṟu maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa camut ppikaḷuka ti kaḷum vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu vilaippiṟamāṉam paṇṇik kuṭutta
pe vayil nāṉkellaiyum Aṉupavikkam Iṭattu taṉ ceyk kuppāṉpokattukku kāṇinilam parimāṟu muṟaimaiyā
māṟimel Uḷḷa mūṉṟiloṉṟāka vanta mutalum kuṟuvai, tiṇai, varaku Eḷḷum koṭip payir maṟṟum karumpu talaikoma maṭik
kkaṭaiyi nattam māvaṭai maravaṭai Āka Ivaiyiṟṟukku pelevām Añciloṉṉāka vanta mutilum puñcai paṟṟukku Eḻiloṉ
ṉāka Uttamutalum Ivvaṭai paṭiyāluḷḷa mutal tevarmayirarkkaviṭṭa nilattukku Ippaṭikku mutalukkumākak kuṭuttu Aṉupava
pārkavum Ivar kkuviṭṭa per pattukkum mutalaṭaivu mutalākap pattup paṅkum paṟṟik ko
ṉṭum nāṭa ciṟapput tiruvāṭappūram tirukkāttikaikku kaṅkiṟamam Āka Ivai yi
raṉukkup koṇṭu māṉ Oṉṟukkut ṭṭuc ceviṭṭu
perumāḷ coṟpaṭi naṭattāka perai ttāṉa māka keṭṭukku pomakāvum Irukāla mum cilavātāruṇṭar tukkum Avar taṉmāka kum
tāṅkaḷum cantirātatvaṟ cella nilai niṟuttik kuṭuppomākavum Ippaṭikku cantirātittavaṟ cella kallilum
cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom Ārumovvāta perumāḷukku śrī rutatra śrī māhe śvāk koyiṟ kaṇakkarom Ippa
mutalipaṭṭa Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku prameśvarabhaṭṭa Ippaṭikku sadāśivapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu māteva
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku perumāḷnampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku taṉmāṇapāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cūriyatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvotta maimaḻakiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai mā Eḻuttu Ivai śrī māheśvara kaṇakku tiruvottarāma maḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivaipramāṇam Eḻutiṇaṉ tirumuṇimaḻiyār Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
